title: Event Cluster
description: Cluster of related records forming a coherent market/event narrative

event_id.description: Unique identifier for the event cluster

title.description: Title of the event cluster (generated from top keywords + dominant event_type + strongest source title)

topic.description: Primary topic category for the event cluster

event_type.description: Dominant event type (e.g., fed_speech, rate_change, quant_move)

summary.description: Brief summary of the clustered event/development

status.description: Cluster lifecycle status: open (actively receiving records), stable (verified, continues accepting), archived (no longer accepting)

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when cluster was created

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when cluster was last updated

record_ids.description: Array of record IDs belonging to this cluster

source_domains.description: Unique source domains represented in this cluster

keywords.description: Top keywords extracted from clustered records

quant_links.description: Quant record IDs linked to this event cluster

article_links.description: Article record IDs linked to this event cluster

confidence.description: Cluster confidence score (0-1, higher = more confident)
